title: Beyth #1047
definition:
Beth-peor = "house of Peor"

 1) a place east of the Jordan, in the land of the Amorites, allotted to
    the tribe of Reuben
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-peor = "house of Peor"

 1) a place east of the Jordan, in the land of the Amorites, allotted to
    the tribe of Reuben

    NASB:  house of Peor, a place E. of the Jordan
